name: Pumpkin Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup thawed Cool Whip whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, pie filling mix, pumpkin, spice, and topping in a deep, narrow bottom bowl.
2. Beat at the lowest speed of an electric mixer for 1 minute.
3. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
4. Chill until set, at least 3 hours.
5. Garnish with additional whipped topping and pecans, if desired.
